jobs.title: E-commerce Staff Tiktok
jobs.description: Kesempatan PT Sinar Kejayaan Online mencari E-commerce Staff TikTok yang berpengalaman dan berbakat untuk bergabung dengan tim pemasaran digital kami di Jakarta Barat. Sebagai E-commerce Staff TikTok, Anda akan memainkan peran strategis dalam mengembangkan dan mengelola kampanye pemasaran digital yang inovatif di platform TikTok untuk mendorong pertumbuhan penjualan dan keterlibatan pelanggan. Posisi ini adalah kesempatan sempurna bagi profesional yang bersemangat tentang pemasaran digital, memahami tren media sosial terkini, dan mampu mengubah insight data menjadi strategi e-commerce yang efektif. Jabatan ini menawarkan lingkungan kerja penuh waktu di lokasi Jakarta Barat, memungkinkan Anda untuk berkolaborasi langsung dengan tim yang dinamis dan inovatif. Tanggung Jawab Mengelola dan mengoptimalkan kampanye e-commerce di platform TikTok, termasuk pembuatan konten visual dan video yang menarik yang sesuai dengan pedoman merek perusahaan. Mengembangkan strategi konten TikTok yang kreatif dan data-driven untuk meningkatkan brand awareness, engagement, dan konversi penjualan. Memantau performa kampanye secara real-time, menganalisis metrik penting seperti reach, engagement rate, conversion rate, dan ROI untuk pengoptimalan berkelanjutan. Berkolaborasi dengan tim kreatif, copywriter, dan designer untuk menghasilkan konten berkualitas tinggi yang resonan dengan target audiens TikTok. Mengelola interaksi dengan pelanggan di platform TikTok, merespons komentar dan pertanyaan dengan profesional dan tepat waktu. Mengidentifikasi tren dan insight konsumen terbaru di TikTok untuk memberikan rekomendasi strategis yang meningkatkan performa kampanye. Melakukan A/B testing pada berbagai elemen kampanye untuk mengidentifikasi formula terbaik dalam meningkatkan hasil penjualan. Membuat laporan analitik dan insights komprehensif untuk stakeholder tentang performa kampanye dan rekomendasi improvement. Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan Diploma atau Gelar dalam Pemasaran, Komunikasi, Bisnis Digital, atau bidang terkait. Minimal 2-3 tahun pengalaman dalam pemasaran digital, e-commerce, atau manajemen media sosial, dengan fokus pada platform TikTok. Pemahaman mendalam tentang algoritma TikTok, fitur platform, dan best practices dalam menciptakan konten yang viral dan engaging. Kemampuan analitik yang kuat dengan pengalaman menggunakan tools analytics seperti TikTok Analytics, Google Analytics, atau platform data intelligence serupa. Mahir dalam membuat konten video dan visual yang menarik, dengan pemahaman tentang teknik storytelling yang efektif di era digital. Penguasaan Microsoft Office dan tools marketing automation, serta familiar dengan platform e-commerce. Kemampuan komunikasi yang excellent, baik lisan maupun tulisan, untuk presentasi dan kolaborasi tim yang efektif. Berpikir strategis dengan kemampuan problem-solving yang baik dan adaptif terhadap perubahan tren pasar. Pengalaman pengelolaan budget iklan digital dan menjalankan paid advertising campaigns di TikTok adalah nilai tambah. Manfaat Utama Perusahaan Gaji yang kompetitif sesuai dengan pengalaman dan kemampuan kandidat. Lingkungan kerja yang kolaboratif dan inovatif dengan tim yang dinamis dan supportif. Peluang pengembangan karier yang jelas dengan akses ke training dan workshop tentang tren digital marketing terbaru. Kesempatan untuk bekerja pada project-project strategis yang berdampak langsung pada pertumbuhan bisnis perusahaan. Asuransi kesehatan yang komprehensif untuk karyawan dan keluarga. Tunjangan dan insentif kinerja berdasarkan pencapaian target kampanye. Fleksibilitas kerja yang reasonable untuk mendukung work-life balance yang sehat. Kesempatan untuk mengembangkan networking profesional di industri pemasaran digital dan e-commerce. Tentang Perusahaan PT Sinar Kejayaan Online adalah perusahaan pemasaran digital yang berdedikasi dalam membantu bisnis mencapai kesuksesan di era digital. Dengan fokus pada inovasi, kreativitas, dan hasil yang terukur, kami berkomitmen untuk memberikan solusi pemasaran e-commerce yang strategis dan efektif bagi klien kami. Perusahaan kami menghargai budaya kolaborasi, pembelajaran berkelanjutan, dan excellence dalam setiap aspek pekerjaan. Kami percaya bahwa karyawan adalah aset terbesar kami, dan kami berdedikasi untuk menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang mendukung pertumbuhan profesional dan personal setiap individu di tim kami. Ajakan untuk Melamar Jika Anda adalah profesional pemasaran digital yang passionate dengan pengalaman di TikTok dan e-commerce, kami mengundang Anda untuk lamar sekarang ! Kirimkan CV, portfolio kampanye, dan surat motivasi Anda kepada tim HR kami. Mari bergabung bersama kami dan tumbuh bersama dalam ekosistem digital yang dinamis dan penuh peluang.

Dengan fokus pada inovasi, kreativitas, dan hasil yang terukur, kami berkomitmen untuk memberikan solusi pemasaran e-commerce yang strategis dan efektif bagi klien kami. jobs.title: Manufacturing Manager
jobs.description: About the role We are seeking an experienced Manufacturing Manager to join PT. Idelux Furniture Indonesia in Semarang, Central Java. This is a contract position that offers a unique opportunity to lead and optimise our manufacturing operations. As Manufacturing Manager, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring efficient production processes, maintaining quality standards, and driving continuous improvement across our furniture manufacturing facility. This position is integral to our operational success and directly contributes to meeting our production targets and delivering excellence to our customers. Key responsibilities Develop and implement manufacturing strategies to achieve production targets, quality standards, efficiency, and workplace safety. Lead manufacturing teams to foster a culture of safety, housekeeping programs, continuous improvement and GMP implementation. Manage manufacturing budgets and investments to enhance productioncapacity, technology and manufacturing systems. Analyse production metrics and key performance indicators to identify areas for improvement and cost reduction Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations within the manufacturing facility Manage inventory levels of raw materials and finished goods to support production requirements Implement lean manufacturing principles and continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency Liaise with procurement, sales, and logistics teams to ensure seamless coordination across departments Conduct regular maintenance and equipment management to minimise downtime and maximise productivity Job Requirements Minimum 8 years of experience in manufacturing management, preferably in the furniture or related manufacturing industry Strong leadership, strategic thinking, analytical skills, and ability to manage manufacturing complexity Strong knowledge of production planning, scheduling, and inventory management system Experience with lean manufacturing, Six Sigma, or other continuous improvement methodologies Proficiency in manufacturing software and ERP systems Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to interpret production data and metrics Knowledge of health, safety, and environmental compliance requirements in manufacturing Excellent communication and interpersonal skills in both English and Indonesian Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Manufacturing Management, or a related field is preferred Work Location : Kawasan Industri Terboyo Timur, Semarang About us PT. Idelux Furniture Indonesia is a leading furniture manufacturer based in Semarang, Jawa Tengah. We are committed to producing high-quality furniture products that meet international standards whilst maintaining operational excellence and customer satisfaction. Our company values innovation, efficiency, and teamwork, creating an environment where skilled professionals can thrive and contribute to our continued growth. We pride ourselves on our manufacturing capabilities, experienced workforce, and dedication to delivering exceptional products to our clients across various markets. Apply now If you are a dynamic Manufacturing Manager with a passion for operational excellence and are ready to make a significant impact on our production operations, we encourage you to submit your application today. Please send your CV, cover letter, and any relevant certifications to our recruitment team. We look forward to hearing from you.

About the role

We are seeking an experienced Manufacturing Manager to join PT. Idelux Furniture Indonesia in Semarang, Central Java. This is a contract position that offers a unique opportunity to lead and optimise our manufacturing operations. As Manufacturing Manager, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring efficient production processes, maintaining quality standards, and driving continuous improvement across our furniture manufacturing facility. This position is integral to our operational success and directly contributes to meeting our production targets and delivering excellence to our customers.

Key responsibilities

  1. Develop and implement manufacturing strategies to achieve production  targets, quality standards, efficiency, and workplace safety.

  2. Lead manufacturing teams to foster a culture of safety, housekeeping programs, continuous improvement and GMP implementation.

  3. Manage manufacturing budgets and investments to enhance productioncapacity, technology and manufacturing systems.

  4. Analyse production metrics and key performance indicators to identify areas for improvement and cost reduction

  5. Ensure compliance with health, safety, and environmental regulations within the manufacturing facility

  6. Manage inventory levels of raw materials and finished goods to support  production requirements

  7. Implement lean manufacturing principles and continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational efficiency

  8. Liaise with procurement, sales, and logistics teams to ensure seamless coordination across departments

  9. Conduct regular maintenance and equipment management to minimise downtime and maximise productivity


Job Requirements

  1. Minimum 8 years of experience in manufacturing management, preferably in the furniture or related manufacturing industry

  2. Strong leadership, strategic thinking, analytical skills, and ability to manage manufacturing complexity

  3. Strong knowledge of production planning, scheduling, and inventory management system

  4. Experience with lean manufacturing, Six Sigma, or other continuous improvement methodologies

  5. Proficiency in manufacturing software and ERP systems

  6. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to interpret production data and metrics

  7. Knowledge of health, safety, and environmental compliance requirements in manufacturing

  8. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills in both English and Indonesian

  9. Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Manufacturing Management, or a related field is preferred

  10. Work Location : Kawasan Industri Terboyo Timur, Semarang


About us

PT. Idelux Furniture Indonesia is a leading furniture manufacturer based in Semarang, Jawa Tengah. We are committed to producing high-quality furniture products that meet international standards whilst maintaining operational excellence and customer satisfaction. Our company values innovation, efficiency, and teamwork, creating an environment where skilled professionals can thrive and contribute to our continued growth. We pride ourselves on our manufacturing capabilities, experienced workforce, and dedication to delivering exceptional products to our clients across various markets.

Apply now

If you are a dynamic Manufacturing Manager with a passion for operational excellence and are ready to make a significant impact on our production operations, we encourage you to submit your application today. Please send your CV, cover letter, and any relevant certifications to our recruitment team. We look forward to hearing from you.

jobs.title: Customer Support Officer
jobs.description: Job Title: Customer Support Officer About The Role: To provide helpful information, answer questions, respond to complaints, and maintain records of customer inputs to ensure customer satisfaction and deliver professional customer support. What Will You Do: Communicating with Customer through various official Channels such as calls/ emails or other customer care service inquiries by implementing decided procedure & Service Standard to Maintain a positive, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times Giving Follow to customers, provide feedback based on decided Service Quality Standard to Ensure customer satisfaction and provide professional customer support Give Respond, Proceed & Monitor customer queries, track progress of solvency, route, and redirect problems appear to correct resources to follow up the queries accurately & based on service quality standard Escalate unresolved queries to the next level of support, then follow up until the case close to Solve the queries accurately & based on service quality standard Keeping records and update data of customer interactions, process customer accounts, and file documents to ensure the data can are complete, accountable and reliable for any related decision or analysis Active in updating, keep Up & knowing Doku product inside and out to be able to respond customer queries accurately based on Services Quality Standard. Active in giving input for improvement based on working process problem identification for the purpose of realizing continuous improvement in Expert Care team Soft Skill Requirements: Strong communication, empathy, and active listening skills. Excellent problem-solving and time management abilities. High attention to detail and ability to work under pressure. Technical Skill Requirements: Familiarity with customer service software and CRM systems. Knowledge of DOKU products and services.

Job Title: 

Customer Support Officer

About The Role: 

To provide helpful information, answer questions, respond to complaints, and maintain records of customer inputs to ensure customer satisfaction and deliver professional customer support.

What Will You Do: 

  • Communicating with Customer through various official Channels such as calls/ emails or other customer care service inquiries by implementing decided procedure & Service Standard to Maintain a positive, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times

  • Giving Follow to customers, provide feedback based on decided Service Quality Standard to Ensure customer satisfaction and provide professional customer support

  • Give Respond, Proceed & Monitor customer queries, track progress of solvency, route, and redirect problems appear to correct resources to follow up the queries accurately & based on service quality standard

  • Escalate unresolved queries to the next level of support, then follow up until the case close to Solve the queries accurately & based on service quality standard

  • Keeping records and update data of customer interactions, process customer accounts, and file documents to ensure the data can are complete, accountable and reliable for any related decision or analysis

  • Active in updating, keep Up & knowing Doku product inside and out to be able to respond customer queries accurately based on Services Quality Standard.

  • Active in giving input for improvement based on working process problem identification for the purpose of realizing continuous improvement in Expert Care team

Soft Skill Requirements:

  • Strong communication, empathy, and active listening skills.

  • Excellent problem-solving and time management abilities.

  • High attention to detail and ability to work under pressure.

Technical Skill Requirements:

  • Familiarity with customer service software and CRM systems.

  • Knowledge of DOKU products and services.

jobs.title: Cook Helper
jobs.description: Qualifications Minimum high school/vocational school graduate or equivalent, preferably in Culinary Arts or Hospitality. Previous experience as a Cook Helper, Kitchen Crew, or Commis is preferred. Basic knowledge of food preparation techniques and kitchen operations. Familiar with food safety, hygiene, sanitation, and HACCP principles. Able to use basic kitchen equipment and utensils safely. Job Description Assist chefs in preparing ingredients according to company recipes and operational standards. Wash, peel, cut, and portion ingredients for daily food preparation. Perform daily mise en place to ensure all ingredients are ready before service. Prepare and cook menu items under the supervision of senior kitchen staff. Ensure food quality, consistency, and presentation meet company standards. Maintain cleanliness and organization of kitchen workstations, utensils, and equipment. Follow food safety, hygiene, sanitation, and HACCP standards at all times. Store and rotate ingredients properly using FIFO/FEFO procedures. Monitor ingredient freshness and report shortages or quality issues to the supervisor. Minimize food waste by following proper preparation and storage procedure

jobs.title: Pengajar
jobs.description: Job Responsibilities 1. Merancang dan menerapkan kurikulum pengajaran yang inovatif dan efektif. 2. Memberikan pengajaran yang menarik dan interaktif untuk siswa di tingkat SMA. 3. Memantau kemajuan siswa dan memberikan umpan balik yang konstruktif untuk membantu mereka berkembang. 4. Berkolaborasi dengan tim pengajar lain untuk mengembangkan sumber daya dan kegiatan pengajaran yang saling melengkapi. 5. Terlibat dalam kegiatan ekstrakurikuler dan acara sekolah untuk mendukung pengembangan siswa secara menyeluruh. 6. Memberikan konsultasi dan bimbingan individual kepada siswa untuk membantu mereka mencapai tujuan akademik. Job Requirements 1. Memiliki gelar sarjana atau setara dalam bidang terkait. 2. Pengalaman mengajar di tingkat SMA minimal 1 tahun. 3. Memiliki pengetahuan yang mendalam tentang kurikulum dan metode pengajaran yang efektif. 4. Kemampuan untuk menciptakan lingkungan belajar yang interaktif dan menarik bagi siswa. 5. Keterampilan komunikasi yang baik dan kemampuan untuk berkolaborasi dengan tim pengajar. 6. Bersemangat untuk terus belajar dan mengembangkan keterampilan mengajar.

Job Responsibilities

1. Merancang dan menerapkan kurikulum pengajaran yang inovatif dan efektif.
2. Memberikan pengajaran yang menarik dan interaktif untuk siswa di tingkat SMA.
3. Memantau kemajuan siswa dan memberikan umpan balik yang konstruktif untuk membantu mereka berkembang.

5. Terlibat dalam kegiatan ekstrakurikuler dan acara sekolah untuk mendukung pengembangan siswa secara menyeluruh.

4. Kemampuan untuk menciptakan lingkungan belajar yang interaktif dan menarik bagi siswa.
5. Keterampilan komunikasi yang baik dan kemampuan untuk berkolaborasi dengan tim pengajar.
6. Bersemangat untuk terus belajar dan mengembangkan keterampilan mengajar.

jobs.title: Content Writer & Copywriter (English Required | Mandarin is a Plus)
jobs.description: About the Role We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Content Writer & Copywriter to create compelling content for our social media, website, marketing campaigns, and digital platforms. The ideal candidate is someone who enjoys storytelling, understands digital marketing, and knows how to write content that informs, engages, and inspires audiences. This role requires excellent English writing skills and the ability to adapt writing styles for different platforms and target audiences. Responsibilities Write engaging captions for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, and other social media platforms Develop compelling marketing copy for advertisements, websites, landing pages, brochures, and email campaigns Research industry trends and transform complex topics into easy-to-understand content Create educational, promotional, and storytelling content Collaborate with the marketing, design, and video teams to produce integrated campaigns Ensure all content aligns with the company's brand voice and communication style Proofread and edit content before publication Generate creative campaign ideas and content calendars Assist in developing scripts for short-form and long-form videos Optimize content for SEO and audience engagement Requirements Must Have Minimum 2 years of experience in copywriting, content writing, journalism, communications, marketing, or a related field Excellent English writing skills (grammar, spelling, and style) Strong research and storytelling abilities Creative mindset with attention to detail Able to adapt writing tone for different audiences Familiar with social media trends and digital marketing Responsible, proactive, and able to work independently Able to meet deadlines consistently Nice to Have Mandarin language skills Experience writing for international audiences Basic SEO knowledge Experience using AI writing tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or similar Experience writing video scripts Experience in healthcare, pet care, lifestyle, or premium service industries Basic graphic design knowledge is a plus What We're Looking For The ideal candidate is someone who: Loves writing and continuous learning Thinks from the customer's perspective Can transform ideas into persuasive and engaging content Has strong critical thinking and research skills Pays attention to details while maintaining creativity Is open to feedback and continuous improvement Enjoys working collaboratively with creative teams Empathetic and emotionally intelligent

About the Role

We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Content Writer & Copywriter to create compelling content for our social media, website, marketing campaigns, and digital platforms.

The ideal candidate is someone who enjoys storytelling, understands digital marketing, and knows how to write content that informs, engages, and inspires audiences. This role requires excellent English writing skills and the ability to adapt writing styles for different platforms and target audiences.

Responsibilities

  • Write engaging captions for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, and other social media platforms

  • Develop compelling marketing copy for advertisements, websites, landing pages, brochures, and email campaigns

  • Research industry trends and transform complex topics into easy-to-understand content

  • Create educational, promotional, and storytelling content

  • Collaborate with the marketing, design, and video teams to produce integrated campaigns

  • Ensure all content aligns with the company's brand voice and communication style

  • Proofread and edit content before publication

  • Generate creative campaign ideas and content calendars

  • Assist in developing scripts for short-form and long-form videos

  • Optimize content for SEO and audience engagement

Requirements

Must Have

  • Minimum 2 years of experience in copywriting, content writing, journalism, communications, marketing, or a related field

  • Excellent English writing skills (grammar, spelling, and style)

  • Strong research and storytelling abilities

  • Creative mindset with attention to detail

  • Able to adapt writing tone for different audiences

  • Familiar with social media trends and digital marketing

  • Responsible, proactive, and able to work independently

  • Able to meet deadlines consistently

Nice to Have

  • Mandarin language skills

  • Experience writing for international audiences

  • Basic SEO knowledge

  • Experience using AI writing tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or similar

  • Experience writing video scripts

  • Experience in healthcare, pet care, lifestyle, or premium service industries

  • Basic graphic design knowledge is a plus

What We're Looking For

The ideal candidate is someone who:

  • Loves writing and continuous learning

  • Thinks from the customer's perspective

  • Can transform ideas into persuasive and engaging content

  • Has strong critical thinking and research skills

  • Pays attention to details while maintaining creativity

  • Is open to feedback and continuous improvement

  • Enjoys working collaboratively with creative teams

  • Empathetic and emotionally intelligent

jobs.title: Full Time Chemistry Teacher
jobs.description: About Us A-Star Tuition is a growing tutoring center dedicated to helping students build strong academic foundations and confidence in Mathematics and Science. Our programs serve middle and high school students, including exam preparation and advanced problem-solving. Job Summary We are looking for a passionate and dedicated Chemistry Teacher to join our tutoring team. The ideal candidate should be able to explain chemical concepts clearly, engage students effectively, and adapt teaching methods to different learning styles. Key Responsibilities Teach Chemistry to middle and high school students. Prepare lesson materials, worksheets and practice exercises. Assess students' progress and provide feedback to parents. Help students develop strong conceptual understanding and problem-solving skills. Support students in exam preparation (school exams, IGCSE, A-Level, IB, AP, etc). Maintain a positive and motivating learning environment. Requirements Possess at least a Bachelor's degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or a related field from a reputable university. Overseas graduates are preferred. Possess a strong understanding of core Chemistry concepts (Organic and Inorganic Chemistry). Possess good communication and teaching skills. Demonstrate strong English proficiency and the capacity to deliver lessons confidently in English. Possess at least 2 years of teaching experience in a school or a similar tutoring center. Show a high level of responsibility towards teaching and students' academic progress. Preferred Qualifications Familiarity with IB DP, IB MYP, AP Chemistry, Cambridge IGCSE, and Cambridge A-Level curricula. Ability to teach multiple grade levels. Familiarity with online teaching tools such as Zoom or Google Meet. Working Hours Monday to Thursday from 2:30 pm to 9:30 pm, Friday from 2:30 pm to 8:00 pm, and Saturday from 9:00 am to 3:00 pm. Qualified candidates are encouraged to submit a resume in English. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview. We offer a competitive remuneration package to candidates who meet the above qualifications.

", "content2": "

About Us

A-Star Tuition is a growing tutoring center dedicated to helping students build strong academic foundations and confidence in Mathematics and Science. Our programs serve middle and high school students, including exam preparation and advanced problem-solving.


Job Summary

We are looking for a passionate and dedicated Chemistry Teacher to join our tutoring team. The ideal candidate should be able to explain chemical concepts clearly, engage students effectively, and adapt teaching methods to different learning styles.

Key Responsibilities

  • Teach Chemistry to middle and high school students.

  • Prepare lesson materials, worksheets and practice exercises.

  • Assess students' progress and provide feedback to parents.

  • Help students develop strong conceptual understanding and problem-solving skills.

  • Support students in exam preparation (school exams, IGCSE, A-Level, IB, AP, etc).

  • Maintain a positive and motivating learning environment.

Requirements

  • Possess at least a Bachelor's degree in Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or a related field from a reputable university.

  • Overseas graduates are preferred.

  • Possess a strong understanding of core Chemistry concepts (Organic and Inorganic Chemistry).

  • Possess good communication and teaching skills.

  • Demonstrate strong English proficiency and the capacity to deliver lessons confidently in English.

  • Possess at least 2 years of teaching experience in a school or a similar tutoring center.

  • Show a high level of responsibility towards teaching and students' academic progress.


Preferred Qualifications

  • Familiarity with IB DP, IB MYP, AP Chemistry, Cambridge IGCSE, and Cambridge A-Level curricula.

  • Ability to teach multiple grade levels.

  • Familiarity with online teaching tools such as Zoom or Google Meet.


Working Hours

Monday to Thursday from 2:30 pm to 9:30 pm, Friday from 2:30 pm to 8:00 pm, and Saturday from 9:00 am to 3:00 pm.

Qualified candidates are encouraged to submit a resume in English. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview. We offer a competitive remuneration package to candidates who meet the above qualifications.

jobs.title: Banking Relationship & Operations Specialist
jobs.description: Responsibilities Serve as the key liaison between the Hong Kong team, Indonesia operations, and partner banks to ensure smooth banking operations. Coordinate with banking partners to resolve operational issues related to international banking transactions. This role focuses on coordinating and resolving operational issues related to international banking transactions rather than processing fund transfers. Monitor banking activities and ensure operational issues are followed up until resolution. Escalate urgent banking issues and provide timely updates to management. Build and maintain professional relationships with banking partners and relevant stakeholders. Collaborate with internal teams to support daily cross-border banking operations. Identify opportunities to improve banking processes and operational efficiency. Prepare and maintain accurate banking documentation and operational records. Requirements Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, Economics, or a related field. Minimum 5 years of experience in banking operations, corporate banking, transaction banking, treasury operations, trade finance, payment operations, or other relevant banking functions. Good understanding of international fund transfers, payment processes, banking operations, and transaction monitoring. Strong problem-solving, analytical, and stakeholder management skills. Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced and dynamic environment while managing multiple priorities. Professional working proficiency in English is required. Mandarin proficiency will be a strong advantage. Proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel, and comfortable learning new systems and technologies.

jobs.title: Social Media Video Editor (English Required | Mandarin is a Plus)
jobs.description: About the Role We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Video Editor to produce engaging social media content for international audiences. If you enjoy storytelling through short-form videos, understand what makes content perform on platforms like Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube Shorts, and have a good sense of pacing, trends, and visual aesthetics, we'd love to hear from you. This role requires someone who is proactive, reliable, and capable of working independently while maintaining high-quality output. Responsibilities Edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube Shorts Produce long-form videos when required Add captions, motion graphics, transitions, sound effects, and background music Color correction and basic audio enhancement Create engaging hooks within the first 3–5 seconds Follow branding guidelines while maintaining creative freedom Organize project files efficiently Meet project deadlines consistently Communicate effectively with the content and marketing team Suggest creative improvements and editing ideas Requirements Must Have Minimum 2 years of experience as a Video Editor Proficient in Video Editing tools Strong understanding of social media content trends Good storytelling ability through video editing Able to work with fast turnaround times Strong attention to detail Good English communication skills (written and spoken) Able to follow English instructions without translation Responsible, disciplined, and self-motivated Nice to Have Able to speak or understand Mandarin Chinese Experience editing content for international audiences Familiar with AI editing tools Experience creating viral short-form content Motion graphics experience Graphic design skills Photography or videography experience What We're Looking For The ideal candidate is someone who: Thinks like a content creator, not just an editor Understands audience retention Pays attention to small details Takes initiative instead of waiting for instructions Can propose better editing ideas Is open to learning and receiving feedback Has a positive attitude and strong work ethic Bonus Points You will stand out if you have experience with: English-speaking content creators Chinese or Mandarin-speaking audiences AI-assisted content production Viral social media content Podcast editing Interview-style videos Educational content Lifestyle or luxury brands

English required; Mandarin is a plus.", "content2": "

About the Role

We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Video Editor to produce engaging social media content for international audiences.

If you enjoy storytelling through short-form videos, understand what makes content perform on platforms like Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube Shorts, and have a good sense of pacing, trends, and visual aesthetics, we'd love to hear from you.

This role requires someone who is proactive, reliable, and capable of working independently while maintaining high-quality output.

Responsibilities

  • Edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube Shorts

  • Produce long-form videos when required

  • Add captions, motion graphics, transitions, sound effects, and background music

  • Color correction and basic audio enhancement

  • Create engaging hooks within the first 3–5 seconds

  • Follow branding guidelines while maintaining creative freedom

  • Organize project files efficiently

  • Meet project deadlines consistently

  • Communicate effectively with the content and marketing team

  • Suggest creative improvements and editing ideas

Requirements

Must Have

  • Minimum 2 years of experience as a Video Editor

  • Proficient in Video Editing tools

  • Strong understanding of social media content trends

  • Good storytelling ability through video editing

  • Able to work with fast turnaround times

  • Strong attention to detail

  • Good English communication skills (written and spoken)

  • Able to follow English instructions without translation

  • Responsible, disciplined, and self-motivated

Nice to Have

  • Able to speak or understand Mandarin Chinese

  • Experience editing content for international audiences

  • Familiar with AI editing tools

  • Experience creating viral short-form content

  • Motion graphics experience

  • Graphic design skills

  • Photography or videography experience

What We're Looking For

The ideal candidate is someone who:

  • Thinks like a content creator, not just an editor

  • Understands audience retention

  • Pays attention to small details

  • Takes initiative instead of waiting for instructions

  • Can propose better editing ideas

  • Is open to learning and receiving feedback

  • Has a positive attitude and strong work ethic

Bonus Points

You will stand out if you have experience with:

  • English-speaking content creators

  • Chinese or Mandarin-speaking audiences

  • AI-assisted content production

  • Viral social media content

  • Podcast editing

  • Interview-style videos

  • Educational content

  • Lifestyle or luxury brands

jobs.title: PURCHASING STAFF
jobs.description: Kesempatan Kami mencari Purchasing Staff yang terampil dan detail-oriented untuk bergabung dengan tim Pembelian kami di PT Sumatera Kartindo. Posisi ini adalah jabatan tetap penuh waktu yang berlokasi di Medan, Polonia, Sumatera Utara. Kandidat yang ideal memiliki pemahaman mendalam tentang proses pengadaan, kemampuan komunikasi yang kuat, dan keahlian dalam mengelola hubungan vendor sambil mempertahankan standar kualitas dan efisiensi biaya. Tanggung Jawab Utama Mengelola proses pembelian secara komprehensif, mulai dari identifikasi kebutuhan, permohonan penawaran harga, hingga penyelesaian transaksi dengan supplier. Melakukan negosiasi dengan supplier untuk mendapatkan harga terbaik, syarat pembayaran yang menguntungkan, dan jaminan kualitas produk yang optimal. Memverifikasi dan memproses dokumen pembelian termasuk purchase order, invoice, dan pengiriman barang untuk memastikan akurasi dan kepatuhan prosedur. Memantau dan mengelola tingkat inventaris untuk memastikan ketersediaan stok yang cukup tanpa mengakibatkan overstocking yang tidak efisien. Membuat laporan pembelian, analisis biaya, dan rekomendasi perbaikan untuk mendukung keputusan manajemen yang strategis. Menjalin dan mempertahankan hubungan profesional yang baik dengan supplier serta menyelesaikan masalah atau keluhan yang mungkin timbul. Mengikuti perkembangan pasar dan tren industri untuk mengidentifikasi peluang penghematan biaya dan peningkatan efisiensi. Memastikan semua aktivitas pembelian sesuai dengan kebijakan perusahaan, regulasi, dan standar kontrol internal yang berlaku. Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan Pendidikan minimal D3 (Diploma) atau S1 (Sarjana) dalam bidang Manajemen, Logistik, Bisnis, Akuntansi, atau bidang terkait. Pengalaman minimal 2-3 tahun sebagai Purchasing Staff, Procurement Officer, atau posisi sejenis di industri manufaktur atau logistik. Pemahaman yang kuat tentang proses procurement, supply chain management, dan manajemen inventaris. Kemampuan negosiasi yang baik dan keterampilan komunikasi interpersonal yang efektif untuk berinteraksi dengan supplier dan pihak internal. Penguasaan sistem ERP dan software pengadaan modern, serta kemahiran dalam Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint). Kemampuan analisis data yang baik untuk membuat laporan dan rekomendasi berbasis data. Perhatian terhadap detail, akurasi tinggi, dan kemampuan manajemen waktu yang disiplin dalam mengelola multiple tasks. Integritas tinggi dan etika bisnis yang kuat dalam menjalankan tanggung jawab pembelian. Kemampuan problem-solving dan adaptabilitas terhadap perubahan situasi pasar atau kebutuhan bisnis. Diutamakan kandidat yang dapat segera bergabung. Lamar Sekarang Jika Anda memiliki pengalaman yang relevan dan tertarik dengan kesempatan ini, kami mengundang Anda untuk segera melamar. Bergabunglah dengan tim kami dan berkontribusi profesional di PT Sumatera Kartindo!

Kandidat yang ideal memiliki pemahaman mendalam tentang proses pengadaan, kemampuan komunikasi yang kuat, dan keahlian dalam mengelola hubungan vendor sambil mempertahankan standar kualitas dan efisiensi biaya.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Mengelola proses pembelian secara komprehensif, mulai dari identifikasi kebutuhan, permohonan penawaran harga, hingga penyelesaian transaksi dengan supplier.

  • Melakukan negosiasi dengan supplier untuk mendapatkan harga terbaik, syarat pembayaran yang menguntungkan, dan jaminan kualitas produk yang optimal.

  • Memverifikasi dan memproses dokumen pembelian termasuk purchase order, invoice, dan pengiriman barang untuk memastikan akurasi dan kepatuhan prosedur.

  • Memantau dan mengelola tingkat inventaris untuk memastikan ketersediaan stok yang cukup tanpa mengakibatkan overstocking yang tidak efisien.

  • Membuat laporan pembelian, analisis biaya, dan rekomendasi perbaikan untuk mendukung keputusan manajemen yang strategis.

  • Menjalin dan mempertahankan hubungan profesional yang baik dengan supplier serta menyelesaikan masalah atau keluhan yang mungkin timbul.

  • Mengikuti perkembangan pasar dan tren industri untuk mengidentifikasi peluang penghematan biaya dan peningkatan efisiensi.

  • Memastikan semua aktivitas pembelian sesuai dengan kebijakan perusahaan, regulasi, dan standar kontrol internal yang berlaku.

Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan

  • Pendidikan minimal D3 (Diploma) atau S1 (Sarjana) dalam bidang Manajemen, Logistik, Bisnis, Akuntansi, atau bidang terkait.

  • Pengalaman minimal 2-3 tahun sebagai Purchasing Staff, Procurement Officer, atau posisi sejenis di industri manufaktur atau logistik.

  • Pemahaman yang kuat tentang proses procurement, supply chain management, dan manajemen inventaris.

  • Kemampuan negosiasi yang baik dan keterampilan komunikasi interpersonal yang efektif untuk berinteraksi dengan supplier dan pihak internal.

  • Penguasaan sistem ERP dan software pengadaan modern, serta kemahiran dalam Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).

  • Kemampuan analisis data yang baik untuk membuat laporan dan rekomendasi berbasis data.

  • Perhatian terhadap detail, akurasi tinggi, dan kemampuan manajemen waktu yang disiplin dalam mengelola multiple tasks.

  • Integritas tinggi dan etika bisnis yang kuat dalam menjalankan tanggung jawab pembelian.

  • Kemampuan problem-solving dan adaptabilitas terhadap perubahan situasi pasar atau kebutuhan bisnis.

  • Diutamakan kandidat yang dapat segera bergabung.


Lamar Sekarang
Jika Anda memiliki pengalaman yang relevan dan tertarik dengan kesempatan ini, kami mengundang Anda untuk segera melamar. Bergabunglah dengan tim kami dan berkontribusi profesional di PT Sumatera Kartindo!

jobs.title: Microbiology Analyst Operator
jobs.description: Description PT. Lautan Natural Krimerindo is a Food and Beverage Ingredients Partner, member of PT. Lautan Luas Tbk., designed for forward-thinking talents. We offer a platform to lead innovation, promote healthy living, advance sustainability, and deliver unmatched customer experiences. Join us to build a career that impacts the world. Job Purpose Melaksanakan pengujian mikrobiologi bahan baku, produk antara, dan produk jadi sesuai prosedur untuk memastikan keamanan pangan dan pemenuhan standar mutu. Duties and Responsibilities NoDescription 1 Melakukan pengujian mikrobiologi sesuai metode dan SOP yang berlaku untuk memastikan keamanan produk. 2 Menyiapkan sampel uji mikrobiologi secara aseptik agar hasil pengujian akurat dan representatif. 3 Mengoperasikan peralatan laboratorium mikrobiologi sesuai instruksi kerja untuk menjaga keandalan hasil uji. 4 Mencatat dan mendokumentasikan hasil pengujian mikrobiologi secara lengkap untuk mendukung traceability data. 5 Menjaga kebersihan, kesterilan, dan kerapian area kerja laboratorium mikrobiologi sesuai standar GMP. 6 Melaporkan hasil uji yang tidak memenuhi standar kepada Microbiology Foreman untuk ditindaklanjuti. 7 Melakukan sterilisasi alat dan media sesuai prosedur untuk mencegah kontaminasi silang. 8 Menerapkan prosedur keselamatan kerja dan penggunaan APD selama aktivitas pengujian mikrobiologi. 9 Menjaga keselamatan kerja sesuai dengan implementasi program K3L - Zero Accident dan HIRADC 10 Melakukan monitoring dan implementasi KPI yang sudah ditetapkan oleh perusahaan sehingga target perusahaan dapat tercapai 11 Mengelola area kerja agar dalam kondisi baik dan tidak mengakibatkan kerusakan produk, kontaminasi silang, kontaminasi material asing, pencemaran lingkungan serta kerusakan peralatan dan prasarana perusahaan 12 Melaksanakan serta mendorong team agar dapat mengimplementasikan program GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices), SSOP (Sanitation Standard Operating Procedure), HACCP (Hazard Analysis & Critical Control Point), sebagaimana yang dipersyaratkan dalam sistem management keamanan pangan FSSC. 13 Melaksanakan serta mendorong team agar dapat mengimplementasikan budaya kerja sesuai dengan prinsip 5R (Ringkas Rapi, Resik, Rawat, Rajin) serta mem-perbaiki setiap temuan audit internal 5R 14 Menjadi Panelis Sensory dalam proses tes sensory. Job Qualifications Education: Education Level: Field of Study: Kimia Analisis Biologi Farmasi Farmasi Industri Bioteknologi dalam Industri Working Experience: 1 - 5 years Training & Certification: - Food Microbiology - GMP & Hygiene Sanitasi - ISO 17025 - HACCP / Food Safety - Biosafety & K3 Laboratorium - ISO 22000 / FSSC 22000 Awareness Knowledge & Skills Teknis: - Metode pengujian mikrobiologi pangan. - Teknik aseptik dan sterilisasi. - Penggunaan media dan peralatan mikrobiologi. - Inkubasi dan pembacaan hasil uji mikrobiologi. - Dokumentasi hasil uji dan traceability. Non Teknis: - Ketelitian dan kehati-hatian kerja. - Disiplin dan kepatuhan prosedur. - Kemampuan mengikuti instruksi kerja. - Kerja sama tim. - Integritas dan kejujuran data. - Kesadaran keselamatan dan hygiene.

Description

PT. Lautan Natural Krimerindo is a Food and Beverage Ingredients Partner, member of PT. Lautan Luas Tbk., designed for forward-thinking talents. We offer a platform to lead innovation, promote healthy living, advance sustainability, and deliver unmatched customer experiences. Join us to build a career that impacts the world.

Job Purpose

Melaksanakan pengujian mikrobiologi bahan baku, produk antara, dan produk jadi sesuai prosedur untuk memastikan keamanan pangan dan pemenuhan standar mutu.

Duties and Responsibilities

NoDescription

1

Melakukan pengujian mikrobiologi sesuai metode dan SOP yang berlaku untuk memastikan keamanan produk.

2

Menyiapkan sampel uji mikrobiologi secara aseptik agar hasil pengujian akurat dan representatif.

3

Mengoperasikan peralatan laboratorium mikrobiologi sesuai instruksi kerja untuk menjaga keandalan hasil uji.

4

Mencatat dan mendokumentasikan hasil pengujian mikrobiologi secara lengkap untuk mendukung traceability data.

5

Menjaga kebersihan, kesterilan, dan kerapian area kerja laboratorium mikrobiologi sesuai standar GMP.

6

Melaporkan hasil uji yang tidak memenuhi standar kepada Microbiology Foreman untuk ditindaklanjuti.

7

Melakukan sterilisasi alat dan media sesuai prosedur untuk mencegah kontaminasi silang.

8

Menerapkan prosedur keselamatan kerja dan penggunaan APD selama aktivitas pengujian mikrobiologi.

9

Menjaga keselamatan kerja sesuai dengan implementasi program K3L - Zero Accident dan HIRADC 

10

Melakukan monitoring dan implementasi KPI yang sudah ditetapkan oleh perusahaan sehingga target perusahaan dapat tercapai

11

Mengelola area kerja agar dalam kondisi baik dan tidak mengakibatkan kerusakan produk, kontaminasi silang, kontaminasi material asing, pencemaran lingkungan serta kerusakan peralatan dan prasarana perusahaan

12

Melaksanakan serta mendorong team agar dapat mengimplementasikan program GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices), SSOP (Sanitation Standard Operating Procedure), HACCP (Hazard Analysis & Critical Control Point), sebagaimana yang dipersyaratkan dalam sistem management keamanan pangan FSSC.

13

Melaksanakan serta mendorong team agar dapat mengimplementasikan budaya kerja sesuai dengan prinsip 5R (Ringkas Rapi, Resik, Rawat, Rajin) serta mem-perbaiki setiap temuan audit internal 5R

14

Menjadi Panelis Sensory dalam proses tes sensory.

Job Qualifications

Education:

Education Level:

Field of Study:

Kimia Analisis

Biologi Farmasi

Farmasi Industri

Bioteknologi dalam Industri

Working Experience:

1 - 5 years

Training & Certification:

- Food Microbiology

- GMP & Hygiene Sanitasi

- ISO 17025

- HACCP / Food Safety

- Biosafety & K3 Laboratorium

- ISO 22000 / FSSC 22000 Awareness

Knowledge & Skills

Teknis:

- Metode pengujian mikrobiologi pangan.

- Teknik aseptik dan sterilisasi.

- Penggunaan media dan peralatan mikrobiologi.

- Inkubasi dan pembacaan hasil uji mikrobiologi.

- Dokumentasi hasil uji dan traceability.

Non Teknis:

- Ketelitian dan kehati-hatian kerja.

- Disiplin dan kepatuhan prosedur.

- Kemampuan mengikuti instruksi kerja.

- Kerja sama tim.

- Integritas dan kejujuran data.

- Kesadaran keselamatan dan hygiene.

jobs.title: Chemical Physics Operator (D)
jobs.description: Description PT. Lautan Natural Krimerindo is a Food and Beverage Ingredients Partner, member of PT. Lautan Luas Tbk., designed for forward-thinking talents. We offer a platform to lead innovation, promote healthy living, advance sustainability, and deliver unmatched customer experiences. Join us to build a career that impacts the world. Job Purpose Melaksanakan pengujian kimia dan fisika bahan baku dan produk jadi sesuai prosedur untuk menghasilkan data uji yang akurat sebagai dasar pengendalian mutu. Duties and Responsibilities NoDescription 1 Melakukan pengujian kimia dan fisika sesuai metode dan SOP yang berlaku untuk memastikan kesesuaian mutu material. 2 Menyiapkan sampel uji dengan benar agar hasil pengujian representatif dan akurat. 3 Mengoperasikan peralatan laboratorium kimia dan fisika sesuai instruksi kerja untuk menjaga keandalan hasil uji. 4 Mencatat hasil pengujian secara lengkap dan tepat waktu untuk mendukung traceability data mutu. 5 Menjaga kebersihan dan kerapian area kerja laboratorium agar memenuhi standar GMP dan keselamatan kerja. 6 Melaporkan hasil pengujian yang tidak sesuai kepada Chemical Physics Foreman untuk ditindaklanjuti. 7 Melakukan perawatan sederhana peralatan laboratorium untuk memastikan alat siap digunakan. 8 Mengikuti prosedur keselamatan kerja dan penggunaan APD selama aktivitas pengujian untuk mencegah kecelakaan kerja. 9 Menjaga keselamatan kerja sesuai dengan implementasi program K3L - Zero Accident dan HIRADC 10 Melakukan monitoring dan implementasi KPI yang sudah ditetapkan oleh perusahaan sehingga target perusahaan dapat tercapai 11 Mengelola area kerja agar dalam kondisi baik dan tidak mengakibatkan kerusakan produk, kontaminasi silang, kontaminasi material asing, pencemaran lingkungan serta kerusakan peralatan dan prasarana perusahaan 12 Melaksanakan serta mendorong team agar dapat mengimplementasikan program GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices), SSOP (Sanitation Standard Operating Procedure), HACCP (Hazard Analysis & Critical Control Point), sebagaimana yang dipersyaratkan dalam sistem management keamanan pangan FSSC. 13 Melaksanakan serta mendorong team agar dapat mengimplementasikan budaya kerja sesuai dengan prinsip 5R (Ringkas Rapi, Resik, Rawat, Rajin) serta mem-perbaiki setiap temuan audit internal 5R 14 Merapikan dokumen-dokumen yang terkait dengan program perusahaan, sebagaimana yang dipersyaratkan dalam sistem manajemen mutu ISO 9001, SMK3, PROPER LH & FSSC. 15 Menjadi Panelis Sensory dalam proses tes sensory. Job Qualifications Education: Education Level: Field of Study: Kimia Kimia Analisis Working Experience: 1 - 5 years Training & Certification: - HACCP / Food Safety - GLP & Hygiene Sanitasi - ISO 17025 - K3 Laboratorium & Penanganan B3 - ISO 22000 / FSSC 22000 Awareness - Kalibrasi & Verifikasi Alat Laboratorium Knowledge & Skills Teknis: - Metode pengujian kimia dan fisika pangan. - Pengoperasian alat laboratorium (moisture analyzer, pH meter, viscometer, dll.). - Preparasi sampel uji. - Dokumentasi hasil uji dan traceability. - Dasar GMP dan food safety. Non Teknis: - Ketelitian dan konsistensi kerja. - Disiplin dan kepatuhan prosedur. - Kemampuan mengikuti instruksi kerja. - Kerja sama tim. - Tanggung jawab dan integritas data. - Kesadaran keselamatan kerja.

Mengoperasikan peralatan laboratorium kimia dan fisika sesuai instruksi kerja untuk menjaga keandalan hasil uji.

4

Mencatat hasil pengujian secara lengkap dan tepat waktu untuk mendukung traceability data mutu.

5

Menjaga kebersihan dan kerapian area kerja laboratorium agar memenuhi standar GMP dan keselamatan kerja.

6

Melaporkan hasil pengujian yang tidak sesuai kepada Chemical Physics Foreman untuk ditindaklanjuti.

7

Melakukan perawatan sederhana peralatan laboratorium untuk memastikan alat siap digunakan.

8

Mengikuti prosedur keselamatan kerja dan penggunaan APD selama aktivitas pengujian untuk mencegah kecelakaan kerja.

9

Menjaga keselamatan kerja sesuai dengan implementasi program K3L - Zero Accident dan HIRADC 

10

Melakukan monitoring dan implementasi KPI yang sudah ditetapkan oleh perusahaan sehingga target perusahaan dapat tercapai

11

Mengelola area kerja agar dalam kondisi baik dan tidak mengakibatkan kerusakan produk, kontaminasi silang, kontaminasi material asing, pencemaran lingkungan serta kerusakan peralatan dan prasarana perusahaan

12

Melaksanakan serta mendorong team agar dapat mengimplementasikan program GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices), SSOP (Sanitation Standard Operating Procedure), HACCP (Hazard Analysis & Critical Control Point), sebagaimana yang dipersyaratkan dalam sistem management keamanan pangan FSSC.

13

Melaksanakan serta mendorong team agar dapat mengimplementasikan budaya kerja sesuai dengan prinsip 5R (Ringkas Rapi, Resik, Rawat, Rajin) serta mem-perbaiki setiap temuan audit internal 5R

14

Merapikan dokumen-dokumen yang terkait dengan program perusahaan, sebagaimana yang dipersyaratkan dalam sistem manajemen mutu ISO 9001, SMK3, PROPER LH & FSSC.

15

Menjadi Panelis Sensory dalam proses tes sensory.

Job Qualifications

Education:

Education Level:

Field of Study:

Kimia

Kimia Analisis

Working Experience:

1 - 5 years

Training & Certification:

- HACCP / Food Safety

- GLP & Hygiene Sanitasi

- ISO 17025

- K3 Laboratorium & Penanganan B3

- ISO 22000 / FSSC 22000 Awareness

- Kalibrasi & Verifikasi Alat Laboratorium

Knowledge & Skills

Teknis:

- Metode pengujian kimia dan fisika pangan.

- Pengoperasian alat laboratorium (moisture analyzer, pH meter, viscometer, dll.).

- Preparasi sampel uji.

- Dokumentasi hasil uji dan traceability.

- Dasar GMP dan food safety.

Non Teknis:

- Ketelitian dan konsistensi kerja.

- Disiplin dan kepatuhan prosedur.

- Kemampuan mengikuti instruksi kerja.

- Kerja sama tim.

- Tanggung jawab dan integritas data.

- Kesadaran keselamatan kerja.

jobs.title: Full Time Mathematics Teacher
jobs.description: About Us A-Star Tuition is a growing tutoring center dedicated to helping students build strong academic foundations and confidence in Mathematics and Science. Our programs serve middle and high school students, including exam preparation and advanced problem-solving. Job Summary We are looking for a passionate and dedicated Math Teacher to join our tutoring team. The ideal candidate should be able to explain mathematical concepts clearly, engage students effectively, and adapt teaching methods to different learning styles. Key Responsibilities Teach Mathematics to middle and high school students. Prepare lesson materials, worksheets and practice exercises. Assess students' progress and provide feedback to parents. Help students improve problem-solving and critical thinking skills. Maintain a positive and motivating learning environment. Requirements Possess at least a Bachelor's degree in Mathematics, Physics, or Engineering from a reputable university. Overseas graduates are preferred. Possess a strong understanding of mathematical concepts. Possess good communication and teaching skills. Demonstrate strong English proficiency and the capacity to deliver lessons confidently in English. Possess at least 2 years of teaching experience in a school or a similar tutoring center. Show a high level of responsibility towards teaching and students' academic progress. Preferred Qualifications Familiarity with IB DP, IB MYP, AP Calculus AB & BC, Cambridge IGCSE, Cambridge A-Level, and Honors Math curricula. Ability to teach multiple grade levels. Familiarity with online teaching tools such as Zoom or Google Meet. Working Hours Monday to Thursday from 2:30 pm to 9:30 pm, Friday from 2:30 pm to 8:00 pm, and Saturday from 9:00 am to 3:00 pm. Qualified candidates are encouraged to submit a resume in English. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview. We offer a competitive remuneration package to candidates who meet the above qualifications.

About Us

A-Star Tuition is a growing tutoring center dedicated to helping students build strong academic foundations and confidence in Mathematics and Science. Our programs serve middle and high school students, including exam preparation and advanced problem-solving.

Job Summary

We are looking for a passionate and dedicated Math Teacher to join our tutoring team. The ideal candidate should be able to explain mathematical concepts clearly, engage students effectively, and adapt teaching methods to different learning styles.

Key Responsibilities

  • Teach Mathematics to middle and high school students.

  • Prepare lesson materials, worksheets and practice exercises.

  • Assess students' progress and provide feedback to parents.

  • Help students improve problem-solving and critical thinking skills.

  • Maintain a positive and motivating learning environment.


Requirements

  • Possess at least a Bachelor's degree in Mathematics, Physics, or Engineering from a reputable university.

  • Overseas graduates are preferred.

  • Possess a strong understanding of mathematical concepts.

  • Possess good communication and teaching skills.

  • Demonstrate strong English proficiency and the capacity to deliver lessons confidently in English.

  • Possess at least 2 years of teaching experience in a school or a similar tutoring center.

  • Show a high level of responsibility towards teaching and students' academic progress.


Preferred Qualifications

  • Familiarity with IB DP, IB MYP, AP Calculus AB & BC, Cambridge IGCSE, Cambridge A-Level, and Honors Math curricula.

  • Ability to teach multiple grade levels.

  • Familiarity with online teaching tools such as Zoom or Google Meet.


Working Hours

Monday to Thursday from 2:30 pm to 9:30 pm, Friday from 2:30 pm to 8:00 pm, and Saturday from 9:00 am to 3:00 pm.

Qualified candidates are encouraged to submit a resume in English. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview. We offer a competitive remuneration package to candidates who meet the above qualifications.

jobs.title: IT Support Engineer
jobs.description: Melakukan instalasi, konfigurasi, maintenance, dan troubleshooting perangkat PC Desktop dan Laptop. Melakukan standarisasi perangkat sesuai kebijakan dan standar perusahaan. Melakukan proses pembuatan (create) dan pemulihan (restore) golden image untuk perangkat pengguna. Melakukan instalasi, konfigurasi, dan troubleshooting sistem operasi Windows dan macOS. Melakukan join domain, konfigurasi user, serta pengelolaan akses perangkat. Melakukan instalasi dan konfigurasi security tools pada perangkat end-user. Melakukan analisa dan penyelesaian permasalahan hardware maupun software. Melakukan monitoring, analisa, dan troubleshooting permasalahan jaringan (LAN/WAN/WiFi). Berkoordinasi dan melakukan eskalasi kepada tim terkait untuk penyelesaian issue yang kompleks. Melakukan instalasi, konfigurasi, dan troubleshooting printer. Melakukan instalasi, konfigurasi, dan troubleshooting perangkat EDC Pinpad. Memberikan dukungan teknis terkait produk Microsoft 365/Office 365. Menyusun dokumentasi teknis terkait instalasi, konfigurasi, dan penyelesaian masalah yang dilakukan. Memberikan dukungan teknis kepada pengguna (onsite maupun remote support) sesuai SLA yang ditetapkan. Kualifikasi Pendidikan minimal S1 Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Komputer, atau jurusan terkait. Memiliki pengalaman minimal 1 tahun sebagai IT Support, Desktop Support, IT Infrastructure Support, atau posisi sejenis. Menguasai sistem operasi Windows dan macOS. Memahami proses deployment perangkat dan pengelolaan image (golden image). Memiliki pengalaman melakukan join domain dan konfigurasi perangkat pada lingkungan Active Directory. Memahami troubleshooting hardware, software, dan peripheral komputer. Memiliki pengetahuan dasar jaringan komputer (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, LAN/WAN, WiFi). Memiliki pengalaman melakukan instalasi dan troubleshooting printer. Memiliki pengalaman melakukan instalasi dan troubleshooting perangkat EDC/Pinpad menjadi nilai tambah. Memahami penggunaan dan troubleshooting Microsoft 365/Office 365. Memiliki kemampuan analisa masalah dan problem solving yang baik. Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik dan berorientasi pada layanan (service-oriented).

jobs.title: Sales B2B
jobs.description: Peluang Kami mencari kandidat dengan semangat tinggi untuk bergabung dengan tim penjualan kami di PT. KAISAR EVS MOTORINDO sebagai Sales B2B. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan menjadi bagian penting dalam mendorong pertumbuhan bisnis kami di pasar Jakarta. Anda akan bekerja secara kolaboratif dengan tim untuk mengembangkan strategi penjualan yang efektif dan mendapatkan pelanggan baru. Tanggung Jawab Utama Mengidentifikasi dan menjangkau calon pelanggan potensial dengan pendekatan proaktif dan persuasif. Membangun dan memelihara hubungan jangka panjang yang saling menguntungkan dengan klien. Memahami kebutuhan pelanggan dan menawarkan solusi produk yang sesuai. Mencapai atau melampaui target penjualan yang ditetapkan. Memberikan umpan balik yang berharga kepada tim untuk meningkatkan strategi dan proses penjualan. Bekerja sama dengan tim internal lainnya untuk mendukung inisiatif penjualan dan pemasaran. Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan Pengalaman minimal 5 tahun dalam peran penjualan B2B, preferensi di industri otomotif. Kemampuan yang terbukti dalam membangun dan mempertahankan hubungan pelanggan yang kuat. Keterampilan negosiasi dan presentasi yang sangat baik. Memiliki pemahaman yang baik tentang tren dan dinamika pasar otomotif. Kemampuan untuk bekerja secara mandiri dan dalam tim. Berorientasi pada tujuan dan mampu beradaptasi dengan perubahan. Pendidikan minimal SMK/Diploma atau setara di bidang terkait. Manfaat Kompensasi yang kompetitif dan skema bonus berdasarkan kinerja. BPJS Tenaga kerja dan Kesehatan Fleksibilitas dalam pengaturan kerja untuk mencapai keseimbangan kehidupan kerja yang baik. Tentang Kami PT. KAISAR EVS MOTORINDO' adalah pemimpin industri otomotif terkemuka di Indonesia. Kami berdedikasi untuk menyediakan produk dan layanan berkualitas tinggi bagi pelanggan kami. Dengan fokus yang kuat pada inovasi dan kepuasan pelanggan, kami terus tumbuh dan memperluas jangkauan kami di seluruh negeri. Sebagai perusahaan yang menjunjung tinggi keberagaman dan inklusi, kami berkomitmen untuk menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang adil dan mendukung, di mana semua orang memiliki kesempatan yang sama untuk berkembang. Jika Anda tertarik untuk menjadi bagian dari tim penjualan kami yang dinamis, lamar sekarang!

Dapatkan gaji kompetitif, asuransi kesehatan, dan peluang karier yang luas.", "content2": "

Peluang
Kami mencari kandidat dengan semangat tinggi untuk bergabung dengan tim penjualan kami di PT. KAISAR EVS MOTORINDO sebagai Sales B2B. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan menjadi bagian penting dalam mendorong pertumbuhan bisnis kami di pasar Jakarta. Anda akan bekerja secara kolaboratif dengan tim untuk mengembangkan strategi penjualan yang efektif dan mendapatkan pelanggan baru.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Mengidentifikasi dan menjangkau calon pelanggan potensial dengan pendekatan proaktif dan persuasif.

  • Membangun dan memelihara hubungan jangka panjang yang saling menguntungkan dengan klien.

  • Memahami kebutuhan pelanggan dan menawarkan solusi produk yang sesuai.

  • Mencapai atau melampaui target penjualan yang ditetapkan.

  • Memberikan umpan balik yang berharga kepada tim untuk meningkatkan strategi dan proses penjualan.

  • Bekerja sama dengan tim internal lainnya untuk mendukung inisiatif penjualan dan pemasaran.

Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan

  • Pengalaman minimal 5 tahun dalam peran penjualan B2B, preferensi di industri otomotif.

  • Kemampuan yang terbukti dalam membangun dan mempertahankan hubungan pelanggan yang kuat.

  • Keterampilan negosiasi dan presentasi yang sangat baik.

  • Memiliki pemahaman yang baik tentang tren dan dinamika pasar otomotif.

  • Kemampuan untuk bekerja secara mandiri dan dalam tim.

  • Berorientasi pada tujuan dan mampu beradaptasi dengan perubahan.

  • Pendidikan minimal SMK/Diploma atau setara di bidang terkait.

Manfaat

  • Kompensasi yang kompetitif dan skema bonus berdasarkan kinerja.

  • BPJS Tenaga kerja dan Kesehatan

  • Fleksibilitas dalam pengaturan kerja untuk mencapai keseimbangan kehidupan kerja yang baik.

Tentang Kami
PT. KAISAR EVS MOTORINDO' adalah pemimpin industri otomotif terkemuka di Indonesia. Kami berdedikasi untuk menyediakan produk dan layanan berkualitas tinggi bagi pelanggan kami. Dengan fokus yang kuat pada inovasi dan kepuasan pelanggan, kami terus tumbuh dan memperluas jangkauan kami di seluruh negeri. Sebagai perusahaan yang menjunjung tinggi keberagaman dan inklusi, kami berkomitmen untuk menciptakan lingkungan kerja yang adil dan mendukung, di mana semua orang memiliki kesempatan yang sama untuk berkembang.

Jika Anda tertarik untuk menjadi bagian dari tim penjualan kami yang dinamis, lamar sekarang!

jobs.title: EHS Specialist
jobs.description: Assess and identify Environmental, Health, and Safety (EHS) risks, regulatory requirements, and potential impacts on stakeholders, ensuring appropriate control measures are implemented and maintained. Implement and maintain EHS programs in compliance with applicable government regulations, ISO standards, and corporate policies. Promote a strong safety culture by ensuring employees and contractors consistently adhere to safe work practices and procedures. Conduct EHS training, induction, and awareness programs while maintaining proper documentation and supporting competency development initiatives. Lead EHS-related activities, including incident management, emergency response planning, evacuation drills, and routine workplace safety inspections. Collect, analyze, and report EHS performance data: including incidents, near misses, inspections, and leading and lagging indicators—to support informed decision-making and continuous improvement. Maintain accurate EHS records, documentation, and reporting systems to ensure compliance with regulatory and organizational requirements. Support EHS audits, inspections, and certification programs, and facilitate EHS committee meetings (e.g., P2K3L), ensuring effective documentation and follow-up actions. Oversee contractor safety management activities, including contractor prequalification, Job Hazard Analysis (JHA/PJHA) review, certification verification, and monitoring compliance with EHS KPIs. Monitor the implementation of corrective and preventive actions (CAPA), provide technical guidance and coaching, and drive continuous improvement in EHS performance across projects and operational activities.

jobs.description: Job Requirements: Minimum Bachelor’s Degree (any major preferred in Marketing, Business, or related field) Minimum 2–3 years experience as Sales Representative in Consumer Electronics / LED TV industry Strong knowledge of LED TV products, market trends, and competitor analysis Having good relationship with dealers, distributors, retail stores, and modern trade channels in Riau Islands, Riau, & West Sumatra Area Target oriented and able to achieve sales targets consistently Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills Able to work independently and as part of a team Willing to travel frequently within assigned areas Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word) Job Responsibilities: Develop and maintain good relationships with dealers and customers Increase sales and market share of LED TV products in assigned area Monitor market conditions and competitor activities Conduct product presentations and promotional activities Ensure product display and branding are implemented properly in stores Prepare regular sales reports and market feedback Coordinate with internal teams regarding stock availability and customer needs Additional Qualifications: Experience handling electronic brands is an advantage Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Energetic, disciplined, and highly motivated Able to join immediately is preferred Able to speak Teociu is a plus point Domicile : Batam / Pekanbaru Handling : Riau Islands, Riau, & West Sumatra

{"id": "93259232", "title": "Sales Area Kepri, Riau, & West Sumatra (Electronics Experience Only)", "teaser": "Lead LED TV sales across Kepri, Riau, and West Sumatra; build dealer networks, grow market share, and achieve area sales targets.", "advertiser": {"id": "60868892", "description": "PT Skyworth Indonesia", "__typename": "JobSearchV6Advertiser"}, "branding": {"serpLogoUrl": "https://bx-branding-gateway.cloud.seek.com.au/9fd0f8f6-32b3-427e-a8b0-89890149aff1.1/jdpLogo", "__typename": "JobSearchV6Branding"}, "companyName": "Skyworth", "currencyLabel": null, "employer": {"id": "310400", "name": "Skyworth", "companyId": "168559161665669", "companyUrl": "https://id.jobstreet.com/companies/skyworth-168559161665669", "__typename": "JobSearchV6Employer"}, "bulletPoints": ["Flexible Batam/Pekanbaru placement", "Grow your dealer network across key regions."], "salaryLabel": "", "listingDate": {"dateTimeUtc": "2026-07-10T16:24:23.000Z", "__typename": "SeekDateTime"}, "locations": [{"label": "Kepulauan Riau", "countryCode": "ID", "seoHierarchy": [{"contextualName": "Kepulauan Riau", "__typename": "JobSearchV6SeoHierarchy"}], "__typename": "JobSearchV6DataLocation"}], "roleId": "Area-Salesperson", "tags": [{"label": "Jadilah pelamar pertama", "type": "EARLY_APPLICANT", "__typename": "JobSearchV6DataTag"}], "workArrangements": {"displayText": null, "__typename": "JobSearchV6WorkArrangements"}, "workTypes": ["Full time"], "classifications": [{"classification": {"description": "Penjualan", "__typename": "JobSearchV6ClassificationDetail"}, "__typename": "JobSearchV6Classification"}], "__typename": "JobSearchV6Data", "_details": {"job": {"sourceZone": "asia-4", "id": "93259232", "title": "Sales Area Kepri, Riau, & West Sumatra (Electronics Experience Only)", "abstract": "Lead LED TV sales across Kepri, Riau, and West Sumatra; build dealer networks, grow market share, and achieve area sales targets.", "content2": "

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum Bachelor’s Degree (any major preferred in Marketing, Business, or related field)

  • Minimum 2–3 years experience as Sales Representative in Consumer Electronics / LED TV industry

  • Strong knowledge of LED TV products, market trends, and competitor analysis

  • Having good relationship with dealers, distributors, retail stores, and modern trade channels in Riau Islands, Riau, & West Sumatra Area

  • Target oriented and able to achieve sales targets consistently

  • Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills

  • Able to work independently and as part of a team

  • Willing to travel frequently within assigned areas

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word)


Job Responsibilities:

  • Develop and maintain good relationships with dealers and customers

  • Increase sales and market share of LED TV products in assigned area

  • Monitor market conditions and competitor activities

  • Conduct product presentations and promotional activities

  • Ensure product display and branding are implemented properly in stores

  • Prepare regular sales reports and market feedback

  • Coordinate with internal teams regarding stock availability and customer needs


Additional Qualifications:

  • Experience handling electronic brands is an advantage

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

  • Energetic, disciplined, and highly motivated

  • Able to join immediately is preferred

  • Able to speak Teociu is a plus point

Domicile : Batam / Pekanbaru

Handling : Riau Islands, Riau, & West Sumatra

{"description": {"paragraphs": ["PT Skyworth Industry Indonesia", "Skyworth was estabblished in 1988, with the head office located within Shenzhen High Tech Industrial Park which is honored as \"China’s silicon valley\", and has more than 40,000 employees. Skyworth is a large-scale high-tech corporation mainly engaged in the development and manufacturing of consumer electronics, display devices, digital set top boxes, security monitors, network communication, semi-conductors, refrigerators, washing machines, cell phones and LED lighting etc. In 2000 Skyworth was listed on the main board of HK Stock Exchange (HK0751). After a development of more than 28 years, Skyworth has grown to be one of the Top Five Color TV brands in the world and a top brand in Chinese display industry market.", "The predecessor of the base is Toshiba Indonesia Consumer Goods Manufacture Corporation which was established in 1996 as a standard Japanese enterprise. In recent years, due to the problem of costs and profits, plus the strong rise of Chinese home appliance enterprises, Japanese brands have begun to withdraw from the home appliance industry.", "Since Skyworth Group officially launched the overseas internationalization path for its own brand in 2010, it has set up seven overseas branches for its own brand. In September 2013, President Xi Jinping advocated the concept of \"One Belt One Road\", which provided Chinese enterprises with a guide of strategic theory and tactic implementation for their overseas development and bolstered the confidence of Chinese enterprises in expanding business overseas.", "Skyworth grasped the chance based on the needs of its own development strategy and took a decisive action under the guide of \"One Belt One Road\" by integrating its overseas supply chain systems and providing its overseas business with a solider service platform and guiding thought. Meanwhile, it also tried to achieve mutual trust and win-win cooperation with local governments, enterprises, distributors and customers to the largest extent. Therefore, it managed to purchase Toshiba's TJP factory in Indonesia after it purchased Sinotec, a famous home appliance brand of South Africa in September 2014 and purchased a German high-end home appliance brand Metz in June 2015. With these purchases, it has sped up its steady pace towards the world's market. So far, Skyworth's Indonesia factory has become the first overseas factory independently operated by itself in the real sense and a manufacture base of Skyworth in Southeast Asia and a supply chain hub for its overseas market.", "Sun Weizhong, general manager of Skyworth's marketing headquarters for its overseas markets, expressed, \"China is now implementing the strategy of One Belt One Road. The trip of Secretary Ma to Indonesia this time is an encouragement for Chinese enterprises to go abroad. He has unveiled the plaque for Skyworth's Southeast Asia Manufacture Base, which is not only a recognition of the path of Skyworth's own brand, but also a milestone event for the TJP factory itself.\""], "__typename": "Description"}, "industry": "Consumer Electronics Manufacturing", "size": {"description": "101-1,000 employees", "__typename": "CompanySize"}, "website": {"url": "http://www.iskyworth.com/", "__typename": "Website"}, "__typename": "Overview"}, "reviewsSummary": {"overallRating": {"numberOfReviews": {"value": 15, "__typename": "NumberOfReviews"}, "value": 4.2, "__typename": "OverallRating"}, "__typename": "ReviewsSummary"}, "perksAndBenefits": [{"title": "Medical", "__typename": "PerkAndBenefit"}, {"title": "Sports (e.g. Gym)", "__typename": "PerkAndBenefit"}, {"title": "Parking", "__typename": "PerkAndBenefit"}], "__typename": "CompanyProfile"}, "companySearchUrl": "https://id.jobstreet.com/id/Skyworth-jobs/at-this-company", "companyTags": [], "__typename": "JobDetails"}}
