jobs.title: OFFICER - SAFETY (JAKARTA)
jobs.description: Requirements: Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Occupational Safety Engineering, Fire Protection Engineering, or related field. Minimum 1 year of experience; fresh graduates are welcome to apply. Possess a General K3 (Occupational Health & Safety) certification. Proficient in Microsoft Office, Microsoft Visio, and AutoCAD 2D. Willing to be placed in Kelapa Gading. Job Description: Assist in supervising and supporting the P2K3 (Occupational Health & Safety Committee). Assist in updating and preparing standardization documents. Assist in conducting K3 training sessions. Assist in conducting K3 audits. Prepare reports.

jobs.title: Project Development at PT Kawasan Industri Terpadu Batang member of PT Danareksa Persero
jobs.description: Perencanaan Pengembangan Infrastruktur Digital Mengumpulkan kebutuhan infrastruktur digital dari tenant dan unit terkait di dalam kawasan. Menyusun kebutuhan teknis awal untuk pengembangan jaringan internet, fiber optic, WiFi zone, dan IoT. Menyelaraskan rencana pengembangan infrastruktur digital dengan kebutuhan operasional tenant dan rencana pengembangan kawasan. Pelaksanaan Proyek Infrastruktur Digital Menyiapkan kebutuhan pelaksanaan proyek infrastruktur digital sesuai ruang lingkup pekerjaan. Mengoordinasikan pelaksanaan proyek dengan vendor, kontraktor, dan pihak internal terkait. Memantau progres proyek agar berjalan sesuai target waktu, mutu, dan kebutuhan operasional. Monitoring Kualitas dan Progres Proyek Melakukan monitoring atas kemajuan pekerjaan proyek digital di lapangan. Memeriksa kesesuaian hasil pekerjaan dengan kebutuhan teknis dan ruang lingkup proyek. Mengidentifikasi hambatan proyek dan menyampaikan kebutuhan tindak lanjut kepada atasan atau pihak terkait. Dukungan Implementasi Smart Industrial Estate Mendukung implementasi infrastruktur digital yang dibutuhkan untuk smart industrial estate. Mengoordinasikan kebutuhan konektivitas dan kesiapan infrastruktur proyek digital pendukung. Memberikan masukan teknis terkait integrasi infrastruktur digital dalam pengembangan kawasan. Koordinasi Mitra dan Vendor Proyek Berkoordinasi dengan vendor, provider, dan kontraktor dalam pelaksanaan proyek digital. Memastikan kebutuhan teknis dan dokumen pelaksanaan proyek tersedia. Mendukung evaluasi awal terhadap pelaksanaan pekerjaan oleh mitra proyek. Pelaporan Kegiatan Proyek Menyusun laporan progres pelaksanaan proyek infrastruktur digital. Mendokumentasikan hasil pekerjaan, kendala, dan tindak lanjut proyek. Menyampaikan laporan proyek kepada atasan sebagai dasar monitoring dan evaluasi. Manajemen dan Mitigasi Risiko Melakukan identifikasi, pengelolaan, pelaporan, kontrol, dan evaluasi mitigasi risiko secara berkala dengan memperhatikan target dan kebijakan risiko sesuai alur proses bisnis dan faktornya, serta memperhatikan aspek risiko dalam setiap keputusan dan ikut dalam program pengembangan budaya risiko.

"created_at": "2026-05-07T07:18:50.230269+00:00", "description": "

Perencanaan Pengembangan Infrastruktur Digital

  • Mengumpulkan kebutuhan infrastruktur digital dari tenant dan unit terkait di dalam kawasan.

  • Menyusun kebutuhan teknis awal untuk pengembangan jaringan internet, fiber optic, WiFi zone, dan IoT.

  • Menyelaraskan rencana pengembangan infrastruktur digital dengan kebutuhan operasional tenant dan rencana pengembangan kawasan.

Pelaksanaan Proyek Infrastruktur Digital

  • Menyiapkan kebutuhan pelaksanaan proyek infrastruktur digital sesuai ruang lingkup pekerjaan.

  • Mengoordinasikan pelaksanaan proyek dengan vendor, kontraktor, dan pihak internal terkait.

  • Memantau progres proyek agar berjalan sesuai target waktu, mutu, dan kebutuhan operasional.

Monitoring Kualitas dan Progres Proyek

  • Melakukan monitoring atas kemajuan pekerjaan proyek digital di lapangan.

  • Memeriksa kesesuaian hasil pekerjaan dengan kebutuhan teknis dan ruang lingkup proyek.

  • Mengidentifikasi hambatan proyek dan menyampaikan kebutuhan tindak lanjut kepada atasan atau pihak terkait.

Dukungan Implementasi Smart Industrial Estate

  • Mendukung implementasi infrastruktur digital yang dibutuhkan untuk smart industrial estate.

  • Mengoordinasikan kebutuhan konektivitas dan kesiapan infrastruktur proyek digital pendukung.

  • Memberikan masukan teknis terkait integrasi infrastruktur digital dalam pengembangan kawasan.

Koordinasi Mitra dan Vendor Proyek

  • Berkoordinasi dengan vendor, provider, dan kontraktor dalam pelaksanaan proyek digital.

  • Memastikan kebutuhan teknis dan dokumen pelaksanaan proyek tersedia.

  • Mendukung evaluasi awal terhadap pelaksanaan pekerjaan oleh mitra proyek.

Pelaporan Kegiatan Proyek

  • Menyusun laporan progres pelaksanaan proyek infrastruktur digital.

  • Mendokumentasikan hasil pekerjaan, kendala, dan tindak lanjut proyek.

  • Menyampaikan laporan proyek kepada atasan sebagai dasar monitoring dan evaluasi.

Manajemen dan Mitigasi Risiko

  • Melakukan identifikasi, pengelolaan, pelaporan, kontrol, dan evaluasi mitigasi risiko secara berkala dengan memperhatikan target dan kebijakan risiko sesuai alur proses bisnis dan faktornya, serta memperhatikan aspek risiko dalam setiap keputusan dan ikut dalam program pengembangan budaya risiko.

jobs.title: Merge and Acquisition
jobs.description: Manage corporate merger, acquisition, investment, and development activities Oversee the entire preparation process up to the Initial Public Offering (IPO) execution, including ensuring the company's readiness for a successful listing on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX). Formulate and manage the company's IPO roadmap in accordance with targets set by management. Coordinate with regulators, underwriters, auditors, legal counsels, and related parties during the IPO process. Ensure corporate readiness across financial, legal, governance, and operational aspects to fulfill public company requirements. Responsibilities Identify merger and acquisition opportunities. Conduct due diligence and business valuation. Prepare investment proposals and strategic partnership frameworks. Support IPO preparation and corporate fundraising initiatives. Core Competencies Financial Modeling. Business Valuation. Due Diligence. Corporate Finance. Negotiation. Strategic Thinking.

jobs.title: Executive Assistant
jobs.description: Manage and maintain the Board Member’s calendars, ensuring all meetings, events, and travel plans are efficiently scheduled and prioritized. Prepare meeting materials, presentations, and reports, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and confidentiality. Organize and coordinate Board and management meetings, including agenda preparation, documentation, and minute-taking. Follow up on key action items and decisions from Board and leadership meetings to ensure timely execution. Handle confidential correspondence, contracts, and internal communications with professionalism and discretion. Act as liaison between the Board, senior management, and external partners, ensuring effective and professional communication. Coordinate complex travel arrangements, including itineraries, logistics, and expense management. Support corporate governance processes, such as maintaining Board documents, approvals, and compliance-related materials. Conduct light research and data gathering to prepare executive summaries or background information as required. Assist with special projects and events on behalf of the Board, ensuring smooth coordination and high-quality execution. Execute all purchase settlements of expenses related to Board member’s usage in daily operations. Ad-hoc Functions: Managing day-to-day operation of services to all Board members including mobilizations, dining preparations and other arrangements related to Board member’s activities. with General Affairs & Human Capital departments. Ensuring condition of Board member’s residences, formalities and families by coordinating with General Affair Department. Assiting Board member’s in conducting visits and other activities related to Company Clients & Guests such as Networking, Seminars and Business Meetings

jobs.title: Business Development Supervisor Animal Food
jobs.description: Develop and maintain strong relationships with existing B2B customers to ensure customer satisfaction and repeat business. Identify, approach, and acquire new customers to expand the company's market presence and achieve sales growth. Prepare and submit quotations, proposals, and project tender documents in a timely and accurate manner. Provide technical and commercial support to customers throughout the sales process. Conduct customer visits, presentations, and product demonstrations to promote company products and services. Negotiate pricing, commercial terms, and contracts with customers. Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer requirements to identify new business opportunities. Follow up on sales inquiries, quotations, and project opportunities to maximize conversion rates. Coordinate with internal departments to ensure smooth order processing, delivery, and after-sales support. Prepare sales reports, forecasts, and customer activity updates while ensuring achievement of assigned sales targets independently.

jobs.title: Study Abroad Consultant
jobs.description: Are you passionate about helping students achieve their dreams of studying abroad? Do you have strong sales skills and the ability to provide expert guidance on overseas education opportunities? If you're a confident, customer-focused professional with a talent for building relationships and driving conversions, Indies wants YOU on our team! What You’ll Be Doing: End-to-End University Application Support: Assist students with every step of their university application, from selecting the right institution to writing compelling personal statements, preparing necessary documents, applying for visas, and providing university preparation guidance. Consult with Potential Customers: Guide prospective students and their families through study abroad options, scholarships, and admissions processes, helping them make informed decisions. Achieve Sales Targets: Engage with leads, address their concerns, and effectively convert them into paying customers. Build Trust and Long-Term Relationships: Maintain strong connections with students and families, ensuring satisfaction, referrals, and long-term engagement.

Lifelong learning comprises four soft skills (Communication, Critical Thinking, Collaboration, Creativity) and four mindset attributes (Curiosity, Initiative, Persistence, Adaptability). Gentem Indonesia Lifelong Learning (GILL) Group's mission is to cultivate lifelong learning from an early age in order to increase the competitiveness of Indonesians. jobs.title: Finance, Accounting, & Tax Specialist for PT. Pelita Abadi Niaga
jobs.description: Mengawasi keuangan, akuntansi, dan pajak serta memastikan kelancaran operasional. Memantau arus kas, menyusun anggaran, dan mengelola laporan keuangan. Memberikan analisis keuangan untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis. Mengawasi pembuatan laporan keuangan bulanan, triwulanan, dan tahunan sesuai standar akuntansi (GAAP/IFRS). Memastikan pembukuan dan rekonsiliasi akun dilakukan dengan akurat dan tepat waktu. Mengawasi pelaporan dan pembayaran pajak perusahaan agar sesuai dengan peraturan. Memastikan dokumentasi pajak lengkap dan siap untuk audit. Mengelola proses audit internal dan eksternal. Memastikan kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan perusahaan, peraturan akuntansi, dan perpajakan. Menyajikan laporan keuangan, pajak, dan analisis kepada manajemen. Memberikan rekomendasi terkait efisiensi biaya dan strategi keuangan.
